reviews.comment:
"no tenían sistema", no funcionaba App ypf,  tampoco daban factura,    luego de estar esperando 15 minutos nos indican que solo hay infinia,  muy mala atención de los playeros

(Translated by Google)
"Their system was down," the YPF app wasn't working, they wouldn't give you a receipt, and after waiting 15 minutes they told us they only had Infinia. The service from the gas station attendants was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZ0s3S3RnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paro siempre a tomar café y la atención del servi compras es siempre exelente. Me da gusto que una empresa de tal magnitud cuide los detalles más pequeños como estos.
Gracias y espero siempre tengan está calidad de personas al frente.

Saludos

(Translated by Google)
I always stop in for a coffee, and the customer service is always excellent. I'm glad a company of this magnitude takes care of the smallest details like these.
Thank you, and I hope you always have this quality of people at the helm.

Best regards
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtemZDSFV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena estación, y comparte el problema actual de falta de combustible y exceso de brasileros y paraguayos que cargan por 2 mangos el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
A good station, and it shares the current problem of fuel shortages and an excess of Brazilians and Paraguayans filling up for 2 pesos a tank.
